entry.title: Re: Changing Fixed Asset in S4HANA Cloud via API
entry.content: Hi,could you provide a payload,i meet the same question?

entry.title: How to get response of backend with Offline OData Upload
entry.content:
In my MDK application, I am trying to access the backend's response through an OfflineOData Upload action.

Actions/UploadChanges.action:

{
    "Service": "/MyApp/Services/MyService.service",
    "_Type": "Action.Type.OfflineOData.Upload",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "upload"
    },
    "OnSuccess": "/MyApp/Rules/ErrorArchive/ErrorArchive_CheckForSyncError.js",
    "OnFailure": "/MyApp/Actions/UploadFailureMessage.action"
}

 

As seen I have added the "upload" ActionResult. In the OnSuccess Rule I have added this code:

var uploadResult = context.getActionResult('upload');

But the upload result is only this: 

Object {data: null, error: undefined, status: 0, enabled: true}

 Tested with MDK-Client 24.7.0

entry.title: SAP Approuter Headers using Private Link Service for Azure Blob Storage
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question in regards to the SAP Approuter (https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/approuter) and its handling of the "Authentication" header when sending backend requests via the SAP Private Link Service.

Use Case Explanation:

In a recent implementiation in a customer project, I was given the task to implement PLS for writing Data to an Azure Blob Storage by use of the SAP Integration Suite. The policies within Azure only allowed Entra-Id based authentication on the Storage Account, so using Access Keys or SAS was not even a considerable option. A Service Prinicple was the way to go here. To have the endpoint of the approuter secured, we implemented an XSUAA which authenticates the Integration Suite to call the approuter endpoint (via x-approuter-authorization Header), however the JWT Token for access to the Blob had to be part of the HTTP Call as well (this must be passed with the standard "Authentication"-Header).

Problem/Question:

It took me a while to find out why the Authentication-Header never appeared in the approuter, until I found out, that the SAP approuter by default deletes this header before sending the request to the backend. On the offical documentation it says because of "security reasons" (see section "Headers"). I would like to know what are these reasons in particular? From my point of view this blocks the support of entra-id-based authentication on blob storages in Azure, which is - btw - the only officially recommended authentication mechanism by Microsoft.

For this setup to work, a manual modification of the approuter was necessary, which is not ideal, especially because it is also not clear why the authetication header is being deleted in the first place.

I would highly appreciate if someone could give an explanation, to see if or how a workaround can be achieved.

Many thanks and Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Tokenization and chain of custody accounting to transition to certified sustainable materials
entry.content: Excellent read, thank you Amit for sharing these insights

entry.title: Re: Standard AR AP aging report APP
entry.content: For more information about how to create your own AR aging report, see the blog post How to create AR aging reports using the "G/L Perspective of AR Aging Grid" CDS view

entry.title: Error in a script to store a column in CSV payload and assign in property
entry.content:
I have written a script to store a column of csv payload in a property but getting the following error. any help will be appreciated.

 

import com.sap.it.api.mapping.*;
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;

def Message processData(Message message) {

def csvpayload = message.getpayload(java.lang.String.class)

def csvRows = csvpayload.split('\n')

def lastRow = csvRows[csvRows.size()-1]

def lastRowCoulmns = lastRow.split(',')

def lastCoulmn = lastRowCoulmns[lastRowCoulmns.size()-1]

message.setHeader('lastColumn', lastColumn)

retun message

}

 

Error:

 

java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: No signature of method: com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.processor.MessageImpl.getpayload() is applicable for argument types: (java.lang.Class) values: [class java.lang.String]

entry.title: Re: "SAP for Me" - Knowledge search result listing is in German
entry.content: For me it's exactly the other way round, did you ever manage to resolve your issue?

entry.title: Re: Issue with CDS Extractor to extract "Dimension" data
entry.content:
it looks like your compounding dimension is not defined properly, you can check below link 

Creation of Compounded Dimensions with ABAP CDS Vi... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Solution to avoid manual addition of contact person p...
entry.content:
The solution is, create a BP of a person and add contact person role BUP001 with details. 

Now, go to relationships and maintain relationship category as TBUR001 Is contact for and mention the main BP to which you would like to add contact person. A new contact person number will be generated here at the corner of the row, copy it. 

Now, go to main BP --> customer role> sales and distribution, add the copied contact person number in the partner function tab and save it. 

Now create sales order and see the patner functions at header level. You will find contact person number in the tab. 

If there two contact persons are maintained in a BP, while creating sales order, system will throw pop up to choose the contact person from those two and populates the contact person in partners tab.

entry.title: EPMDimensionOverrideRange
entry.content:
Hi

Can I use the EPM dimension override range function to override one dimension for a base list of members in an excel range? 

=EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000","PROFITCENTRE","BAS("&$A$3:$A$5&")")

When I try the below it says the third parameter isn't valid. What's the right syntax for pulling base members from a range of cells?

entry.title: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content:
Hello experts!

My client has specific need. They are using Trial Balance Report from financial module.

As you know, this report displays business partners, their Opening Balance, Debit, Credit and Ending balance. This format of this report is acceptable, only thing they want to change is that they want to filter business partner balances by their control accounts. For example, if business partner has entries on two control accounts, they want to choose which control account to display in Trial Balance. As i know this is not possible in Trial Balance.

Do you have any suggestions which report should we use to cover this issue?
1. Report must include Opening Balance, Debit, Credit, Ending Balance

2. Repost must be filtered with control accounts

I would be very grateful, if you will give me some suggestion which report will cover these two topics.

entry.title: IAS Deletes Business User Group in SAP
entry.content:
When Syncing our Users from the IAS to SAP, the Business User Group of our Users is set empty.

We don't want IAS to do Group Governance within SAP.

I have already removed everything from the transformations, that included Group.

Why is it still deleting User Groups set in SAP?

THX!!!

entry.title: GCTS Exception on Release of Customizing Transport (gCTS Registry)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We implemented GCTS registry using BADI implementation (SAP-samples/s4hana-gcts-badi: Sample code to integrate your ABAP development processes with gCTS to enable task-based committing and to integrate the gCTS Registry in the process of releasing a task.)

 

For object 'ACGR' (Role) below code raises 'object is not present in system' exception. This code basically does this check for all non-customizing objects. 

Error action PREPARE_OBJECTS_FOR_PUSH Object does not exist in system

It seems, 'ACGR' has to be added to below list to identify it as a customizing object and stop the exception.

 

Regards,

Manoj

entry.title: HANA Stored Procedure - Dynamically assign column name while calling a select using a variable
entry.content:
Hallo Experts,

I have a control table with below columns

RowID||Table Name||Field||Description

1||TVKO||VKORG||Sales Org

2||TVKOV||VTWEG||Dist Channel

I need to write a Stored procedure to read data from TVKO and TVKOV tables from VKORG and VTWEG fields and insert to a table named Merge_Table.

Initially I am storing TVKO, VKORG and Sales Org Values in variables and calling a insert function as below

insert into "DBADMIN"."Merge_Table" ("Check_Table","Code", "Description") 
          select v_check_table, :v_code, v_description from "DBADMIN"."v_check_table"

In above query for 2nd column I need values stored in VKORG field, howevever instead of values VKORG is getting inserted. 

Requesting help to modify above query where data from column is read dynamically.

  1. Thank You

in SAP HANA Modeler, I have a few Tables and Views in my _SYS_BIC Catalog. I am wondering about how these objects are being transported from development to production (I didn't create them originally, now I want to add another one).

I know that Calculation views are transported with SCTS_HTA, but what about the created tables/views these Calculation Views may be using?

Thank you!

Currently I have tried and its not working and there are not much documentation and notes available for this scenario.

I am able to run ATC check from central ATC system but not able to trigger ATC from satellite system(S4HAAN) which should run in Central ATC system (S4HANA)

Kavita

entry.title: Troubles connecting to HANA Cloud from BAS
entry.content:
I am having troubles connecting to HANA DB from a local server instance in BAS.
The issue appears when triggering an endpoint on the server that requires a db connection.
There are no errors on server startup however, all the bindings are resolved correctly. Server is booted via cds watch --profile hybrid command.
Credentials for the connection to HANA are provided explicitly in package.json -> cds and are correct.

Rebinding/ restarting HANA instance does not have any impact, nor does restarting BAS workspace.
Below is a screenshot of the error.  

Any support would be much appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 1 (Prerequisites)
entry.content:
@Gunnar92 I know there are a few enhancements planned for the Team View, but I kindly ask you to check the Roadmap Explorer for reliable information on what exactly might be planned. 

Please advise clients that the Team View is not meant as a substitute for reporting. If we are talking about large numbers of people for whom they want to see the distribution and ratings of attributes, they should look into story reports.

entry.title: In the AW01N screen, the incorrect value is displayed in the Posted Values tab.
entry.content:
The value in valuation area 01 is 7000 TRY, and the value in valuation area 21 is 214.76 TRY. Valuation area 26 is configured to be the sum of these two areas. However, in the Posted Values tab for valuation area 26, I can only see the values from area 01. How can I view the sum of these two areas in valuation area 26?"

26: 

 

OADB: 

Best regards.

entry.title: SSO to be enabled while launching BW/4HANA cockpit from eclipse
entry.content:
Hello 

We have BW/4HANA system where SSO works for SAP GUI. 

SSO is not configured for BW/4HANA administrative cockpit.

BW team launches the BW/4HANA cockpit by right clicking in the eclipse and then login page appears to enter credentials . We want to mitigate this login page and enable SSO.

As BW/4HANA cockpit is embedded Fiori , Does the standard saml2 procedure helps here ? Or do we need to have any other steps from eclipse perspective ?

Can anyone suggest?

entry.title: PAIN 002 - 2YM
entry.content:
Hi,

We are now using scope item 2YM to handle CAMT053 in to the system and Pain.001 through BTP. So far so good. We then would like to handle Pain.002 files for rejected payments via the integration but we can not find any good API to handle this in either scope item 1EG or 2YM. We gave also looked through the SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Cash management package with scope item J77, J78 except from the two scope item above. No API that we can use.

We then went through the business accelerator hub for APIs and we can not find anyone that suits our need. Link: https://api.sap.com/search?searchterm=bank&tab=APIs&$refinedBy=true&$type=(%22API%22,%22API%20Package%22)

Which scope item / API is it that we need to use to get the Pain.002 message integrated?

All the best,

Adam

We are creating a CICD tool for the integration suite, and we are using the Cloud Integration APIs to import the artifacts.

 

link
https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/resource/Integration_Flow

 

To deploy, we are using the /DeployIntegrationDesigntimeArtifact api, however, we have the Edge Integration Cell in our landscape and we would like to deploy to the Edge and the api does not have a parameter to determine the Runtime Profile.

 

Could you help us with this guidance.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Transfer Project Subcontracting stock (R) to Project...

I have found soultion for this and worked for me.

Go to MIGO>>Settings>>default setting : "Propose All Items".

or you can add the 542 R also in the list if neeed.

Thanks

Any suggestions will be helpful to deal with this issue in BTP workzone.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.content:
Hi Kiran,

Please refer the below link for a detailed outline of material staging from WM location to IM location.

Material Staging through MF60-WM to IM Managed Location

Let me know if this solves your query.

Regards,

Leelamohan

entry.title: Re: Rf scanning QR codes in warehouse processes
entry.content:
Hi @RayThomson ,

if a QR can be read or not depends on the configuration of the physical device.

Since QR codes usually contain multiple data points, I suppose your questions aims at whether it is possible to decode a GS1-128 barcode. This is on the roadmap for 2502:

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67837800100800007389&BC=6EAE8B27FCC11ED892E91B6B24A440CC&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=7790EF56B6721EEFA8CE5EAB9DAB5E7D

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Dynamic description for cross calculation
entry.content:
Greetings, 

One of the latest updates allowed for Calculation Input Controls to be selected for the description of a Cross-Calculation (which is a great feature!) However, I am attempting to use an input control for the current period, and the Description in my table is not updating when the input control is updated. If I remove/add the selected input control from the cross calculation description, the description in the table will update to the correct period selection. Is this a known bug.

Thank you!

-UKMBP_CMS

-KNKK returned 0 records

 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Guided Implementation App - How are Tasks flagged?
entry.content:
fyi, when reviewing the latest "What's New in SAP Cloud ALM" I noticed an enhancement for "Guided Implementation". Curious, I checked the SAP Cloud ALM Demo Tenant and noticed there is an App called "Guided Implementation" which seems to have a subset of Tasks which are flagged from the SAP Activate Methodology. See below.

My question is how are those specific Tasks flagged so they show up under the "Guided Implementation" Tasks? I tried reviewing them via the Tasks App for Tags, Type, etc. and could not see anything different about these handful of Tasks. Just wondering how they are identified as "Guided Implementation" Tasks? 

Thank you for the help!

Henrietta

entry.title: Inquiry about Exam Code for Public Sector Collections and Disbursements
entry.content:
I hope this message finds you well.

I am trying to register for the Public Sector Collections and Disbursements exam, but I am having difficulty determining the correct exam code. The information I found was confusing, and I want to ensure I have the right code before scheduling my exam.

Could you kindly provide me with the correct Public Sector Collections and Disbursement exam code? I would greatly appreciate your assistance in this matter, as it will help me move forward with my registration.

entry.title: How to add vairables to give results from last month, two month ago etc.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to be able to amend this query that gives results for all purchase orders from one month ago, two month ago, three months ago etc. Currently it retuns only last month.
Is it possible to have a user input where you enter how many months ago you want to view?
I.E. enter 1 for 1 month ago, 2 for 2 months ago...

SELECT 
OPCH.DocNum, OPCH.DocDate, OPCH.CardCode, OPCH.CardName, OPCH.DocTotal, OPCH.VatSum, (OPCH.DocTotal-  OPCH.VatSum) as 'Nett' 

FROM OPCH OPCH 

WHERE 
OPCH.U_CDL ='y' 
and 
OPCH.DocDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE())-1, 0) 
and 
OPCH.DocDate <= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())-1, -1)
 
order by OPCH.DocNum asc

I've tried;

OPCH.DocDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE())[%0], 0) and 
OPCH.DocDate <= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, [%0], GETDATE())[%0], [%0])

But the input changes to a date automatically and obviuously fails.

Thanks.

entry.title: unable to assign the people to the work order operation.
entry.content: I resource scheduling for maintenance planner(RSH) I am unable to assign the people to the work order operation

entry.title: Re: Convênio 109 Transferência
entry.content:
Olá Marcelo.
Vários ajustes tributários vem sendo tratado no SAP com BAdi para implementação individual. Verifique se existe um ponto de implementação para o seu caso.

entry.title: Complex classical SE38 programs converted to RAP Based Fiori apps
entry.content:
Hi, we are trying to convert some of our editable ALV apps with some complex functionality to RAP based fiori apps. Initially, we wanted to go with the unmanaged query (custom entities) option, but there are certain limitations (e.g., determinations are not supported, supports oData v2 only since oData v4 is read-only for non-draft) which lead us to creating the app using a managed RAP BO with unmanaged save (with draft). We also wanted to use oData v4 as much as possible so that in case in the future we have to extend the app again, we can apply the flexible programming model concept.

The starting point is the overview list with just one record. We achieved this via the singleton concept using the user account standard table.

When the clicks the open application, it will open an object page, where user can define the selection screen parameters and extract the data. As you can see, the material and MRP range, we have to convert the Materials and MRP Range selection into a table. Also, to be able to create this app, we have to create dummy custom tables which will store the selection screen values and results.

To extract the data, we have to define the selection screen values and click 'Retrieve' button. This app has 3 hierarchical levels, which is Material, Material/MRP and Material/MRP/Customer. Each of these hierarchical levels has a corresponding dummy UI table. 

Material

Material/MRP (entering values here should auto populate the next level)

Material/MRP/Customer (entering values here should populate the higher level)

The only thing with apps created this way is we have to ensure that the Draft/Final tables are cleared whenever the user opens the app, similar to how SE38 programs behave where the user is presented with a blank screen every time they run the program.

Initially, we were checking if there are events/hook methods when clicking the row in the overview list page so that we can clear the draft/final tables. But we haven't found any, so what we did is to introduce a static action. What this static action will do is clear the draft/final tables and open the object page.

We managed to reduce the number of clicks the user has to do by making it a static action, removing the chevron arrow icon so that the user will always have to click the Open Application button to navigate to the object page and open the object page in 'Edit' mode so they don't have to click 'Edit' every time they open the app.

Now, we were just wondering how SAP did/designed it using standard apps? I tried to look for sample apps in the fiori apps library but most apps were created using freestyle or some older technologies like BOPF and I didn't find any app similar to this. We were just wondering if there is any better way to create this app?

@Andre_Fischer, any idea how to go around with this? Thanks!

entry.title: A cleared incoming payment is still showing under the cash open items.
entry.content:
A cleared incoming payment is still showing under the cash open items. While trying to run the Cash -open items with the relevant data selection, can able to see that the statement item with some value under the balance line item currency.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: A cleared incoming payment is still showing under the...
entry.content:
Basically in the Cash Open Item Report, the Bank-Statement Item which is for Incoming Payment, but if you the follow up documents which is it's Clearing-Documents has been already cancelled. And if Clearings are being cancelled then it's corresponding Payment will again become as in Open-state and that can be used later to clear any Open-Item, in near future.

So, the display of Bank-Statement Item in Cash Open Report is as per the standard behavior.

entry.title: Create a new Z field in ME21N/ME22N/ME23N under Delivery tab
entry.content:
Hello,

would be possible to create a new Z field in the Delivery tab at item level in this transactions? I found some Badis and user exits but none meets this possibility.

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC – Technical Setup step by step
entry.content:
Hi Kavita @amitpdutta ,

yes it is possible to check from the central ATC check system a system which is on the same release. Please make sure, that developer scenario is set up as explained in the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/remote-code-analysis-in-atc-for-developers/ba-p/13318437 in order to use central ATC from the development (satelite) system.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: External Learning User IAS Migration
entry.content:
Hello Manuela, did you get an answer please? Just having the same issue.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Good morning all,

Do we have any update on when BSI might release the updated Washington PFML rates for 2025? We've seen these coming out in the past few weeks for other states, and the official rates have been available from the State for a few weeks, and we're getting close to the wire (one thing to note: Washington does not allow updated rates to be charged to employees retroactively, so it's imperative to have them in place before the first payroll of the new year, which we start running in mid-December, else the employer has to absorb the difference).

Cheers,
Matt

entry.title: Second Half 2024 Release: Introducing the SAP SuccessFactors Career and Talent Development solution
entry.content:
At SuccessConnect last month we announced the availability of SAP SuccessFactors Career and Talent Development, a new offering combining the strengths of SAP SuccessFactors Succession & Development and SAP SuccessFactors Opportunity Marketplace into one solution to guide career development and talent planning in an intuitive way.

This solution offers skill-based insights into where employees currently stand in their careers and maps out a path for future growth. By focusing on skills, it helps employees and managers align career plans and development goals with both personal aspirations and organizational priorities. This approach helps build a strong talent pipeline, keeps critical skills within organizations, and ensures that the workforce reaches its full potential. Leaders can nurture the next generation of talent by encouraging internal mobility and retention, ensuring organizations long-term success. Plus, the talent intelligence hub acts as a foundation for skills, making this an AI-powered experience.

(Growth Portfolio)

In the 2H 2024 release, we're introducing AI-assisted career insights. These insights give you personalized guidance to help employees achieve target roles. You can set new career goals and boost your skills with confidence, knowing you've got clear guidance on where to improve. Plus, you can check out suggested roles in both card and chart views. How are these suggested roles determined? Employees aspirations, skills, and attribute ratings, along with the career paths set by your organization.

(AI-assisted career insights)

(Suggested roles)

With this update, you'll get smarter AI-powered recommendations for a more tailored and hands-on employee growth experience. Job and assignment suggestions will match current skills and aspirations, while also aligning to organizational priorities. Plus, we're rolling out AI-assisted assignment creation. This new feature is a time-saver for assignment owners, as you can now create and edit assignments using AI assistance. Just type in the objectives, and the system will generate an assignment for you. It'll even suggest skills to link to the new task. On top of that, the new admin view makes it easier for experiential program admins to keep an eye on and manage assignments, helping them track progress and offer better guidance.

(AI-assisted assignment creation)

To read about the latest 2H innovations for our other talent solutions check out:

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals

Discover more 2H 2024 innovations across the suite by checking out the release highlights brochure, overview video featuring Bianka Woelke and much more on the Product Release & Road Map Information page.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

entry.title: SAC Data Modeling: Combine Data and map to unassigned
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I found this training here: Importing and Preparing Transaction Data in a Model Link: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/design-data-models-and-transform-data-in-sap-analytics-cloud/importing-and-wrangling-transactional-data-in-a-model_ef525316-3e9b-4f7e-8108-c3131bfdaf2e

1. In the section Map to Targed the mapping function to unassigned is mentioned. Does this function still exist in the current version of normal models? If so, where, somehow I have not yet understood how it works?

2.And the second question is about the section: Combine Data from Two Sources: Account-Based Model Only
The video talks about a Combine Data function, where can I find this function?

Regards
Niels

entry.title: Re: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Hi @junwu

eg:

<VBox id="getAvailableItems" binding="{path : '/getHierarchy(...)', parameters : {$select : ['ID', 'Name']}}">
    <List id="xyz" items="{value}">
        <items>
            <ObjectListItem title="{Name}" />
        </items>
    </List>
</VBox>

 

add a namespace to the path, remove all parameters, bind only the path, ...

I really only want to do this for a bound function without js code

entry.title: Steps to Replace OData in Business Application Studio UI5 Extension Project
entry.content:
How to change OData service when using BAS Extension Project for Standard Apps

Background: Sometimes, standard FIORI apps cannot be extended via BAS Adaptation Project. This limitation arises if the app contains synchronous views. In such cases, you may need an alternative approach to customize the app effectively. 

Requirement: The standard app ‘Transfer Stock - Cross-Plant’, includes buttons to transfer stock between plants. My requirement is to customize the app to grey out the buttons based on the plant category. 

Solution:

This standard app uses OData service MMIM_MATERIAL_DATA_SRV. To implement the required changes, I created a custom OData service ZMMIM_MATERIAL_DATA_SRV, based on the standard service with an additional field. While the creation of this service is beyond the scope of this blog, I will focus on integrating it into the app.

The buttons I customized are highlighted in the below image.

Image source: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F1957')/S21OP

Steps to Implement the Customization

1. Start by opening the BAS tool and selecting the Adaptation Project option.

2. Fill in the necessary details for the project setup and proceed to the next step.

3. Select the relevant system associated with the project.

4. Upon choosing the standard app, a message will appear indicating that the app contains synchronous views.

5. Due to the limitation, you cannot proceed with an Adaptation Project. Instead, create an Extension Project and click Finish.

6. Once the Extension Project is created, open it separately (optional). Then, create an extension by right-clicking the .extconfig.json file.

7. In the context menu, choose ‘Extend Controller’ and then select ‘Copy of the Original Controller’.

8. Uncomment the function ‘_loadMaterial’ in the file ‘S1Custom.controller.js’. This is where the oData service needs to be replaced.

9. Replace references to the standard OData service with the custom OData service ZMMIM_MATERIAL_DATA_SRV in your UI5 extension project. The required changes are shown below:

10. Search for all occurrences of the model  ‘oMaterialData’ in the code. Update them accordingly to use the custom service.

11. In the custom OData service, I added a new property ‘PlantCategory’ to the existing entity type ‘MaterialPlant’.

12. Update the UI5 code to use new property ‘PlantCategory’ in the function ‘_checkFirstClickIsAllowed’. This ensures the buttons are always greyed out based on the plant category.

Testing:

Before the change (in the standard app):

                                                               

After the change (in the enhanced app):

As it can be seen from the above output, the buttons in the entire row are disabled. Requirement has been achieved.

entry.title: Re: Transform internal table into Excel to send by email without downloading
entry.content: Are there a way to transform the smartform in excel?

entry.title: Re: Flexible Item Category Determination in SAP Cloud Public - Custom Adaptions
entry.content:
Great job, my friend. Additionally, here is the method to transport the BRF+ content:

  • When you try to copy the application to your custom application system automatically chooses the transport request with the category Default in ( Export customizing requests )
  • Before you save your application make sure that you have a task in that request created by your user which will contain your BRF+ application with all its content to QAS and PRD servers 

Note# 

You can only create a BRF+ application in the DEV server and then transport it using Export customizing requests and Import collection app

entry.title: Re: BI Support Tool runs very slow.
entry.content: Yea its so slow clicking on anything takes hours for the request to come back, if it comes back at all.

entry.title: Process order with DLV status are not settled
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have two process orders which are having DLV status set on 24.11.2024 which falls on P11. We ran the job's for collective order settlement on 25.11.2024. The variances for these two orders were not calculated and in result the orders were not settled. When we ran the collective settlement on 30.11.2024 which falls in P12, these orders were settled. My question here is the DLV status was set in P11 still why system has not calculated or settled the order when we ran the settlement process on 25.11.2024.

Any help will be highly appreciated, Thanks in advanced.

entry.title: Snapshots in Planning Area - Can we Merge, Export to another Planning Area ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Snapshots in Planning Area -

1 ) Can we Merge Snapshots in Planning Area to another Planning Area ?

2 ) Can we Export Snapshots in Planning Area to another Planning Area ?

After making changes to Snapshot (From Period, To Period), I have activated Planning Area1 and compared with another Planning Area2.

system is showing the differences in the Planning Area1 and Planning Area2.

But I cannot see option to select Snapshots to Marge from Planning Area1 into another Planning Area2

 

Please help me in this regard.

Appreciate your help.

Thanks.

Parthi

entry.title: Re: IPS Requirement to Activate People Analytics
entry.content: Did you end up with using IPS? We are in the same situation and I found it kinda strange to force upon us Identity Provisioning from SF to IAS. Normally we would not use the user store in IAS alltogether (except for initial onboarding up to the point we switch to Corporate IdP).

entry.title: Re: Transform internal table into Excel to send by email...
entry.content:
Smartform can generate XSF data (XSF stands for XML for Smart Forms)

So ou could try

  • generate such XSF data - Output in XSF Format 
  • convert this XML data to Excel  - convert XML to XLSX 

But you could directly send the XML file

entry.title: Re: Security Certificate is not from a trusted certifying...
entry.content:
For SAP10 pl 2411 error Certificate Not From Trusted Authority - we had to update registry key

Create or edit registry key HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Manage\SAP Business One\ValidateSSLCertificate with DWORD value "0"

entry.title: Successfactors initial deployment - Identity provisioning really needed?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are initially deplyoment a 3 environment SF landscape. This came pre-bundled with one IAS DEV Tenant and re-used two other existing IAS tenants. So our setup is as such

  • IAS DEV = SF DEV
  • IAS QAS = SF QAS + IBP QAS
  • IAS PRD = SF PRD + IBP PRD

Now our implementation partner advises on provisioning of users from SF to IAS.

Is it really needed to have users synced from SF to IAS? I see it seems mandatory to some extend when a use case is People Analytics. However, there ought to be also some old school Sync using OData which functions directly between SF and PA?

Any clarficiation or confirmation would be nice.

Jens

entry.title: roles for user in SU01 for to send email
entry.content:
hello everyone,

I'm using the method cl_sapuser_bcs=>create( lv_sender ) to send the email.

I need to create a user in SU01 to use in the variable above "lv_sender".

What roles should the user I create in SU01 have?

entry.title: Re: Facing issue while Decoding Base64 Encoded PDF in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Arvik,

Maybe I don't understand something here but the provided file is not Base64 encoded, it's a standard PDF file. So if you try to decode it then you receive incorrect data which are not a proper PDF file.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@Rajesh_21 hi, great to meet you. I work for SAP and live outside of Philadelphia, PA, US. I am a community advocate, and I sincerely welcome you.

If you haven't yet please JOIN Bengaluru - SAP Community to meet and mingle with other local community members.

May I as your topic areas / expertise? I can point you to some other areas. Please check out and join the many interest groups too!  Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@sandy-sanders great to meet you. I live in (right now cold) Philadelphia. My homebase is the SAP Newtown Square office.

May I ask your area of expertise? Please consider starting a location group Americas | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community!

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @IbeMarcus great to meet you. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. I work in SAP community as a community advocate. Please consider joining one of the many interest groups. May I ask your area of expertise? Also, you may consider staring a group to mix and mingle with those locally with common interests! Best of luck! Americas | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Great to meet you! Please consider joining one of the many interest groups! I wish you great success and welcome to SAP Community!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

entry.content:
Hi

We are trying to delete Space for BWBridge as we want a different name

But while deleting getting error as cannot delete space as it's of type BWBridge.

Unable to find any document around it..

Please suggest 

Thanks

Biswajit

entry.title: Re: Facing issue while Decoding Base64 Encoded PDF in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Andrzej,

It's my bad as I shared the PDF file instead of the Base64 string.

I am getting this Base64 String from Source , I am performing a PUT call to update the Pdf file (binary) in Ariba.

PUT call is successful and getting back the response but the PDF file is showing blank  after opening in ARIBA for this particular input file. Tested with few other input file and for them also the PDF not opening in ARIBA (showing can't open and file is damaged).

Even we tried saving the body from HTTP call as pdf and that is also giving me error.

Similar issue  - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/send-pdf-through-sap-cpi-pdf-data-lost-after-message-reached-target/qaq-p/12408834 

STEP 1 : Base64 payload as BODY

STEP 2: Decoder from palette

STEP 3: Groovy for building input body

STEP 4: HTTP PUT call

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.Base64;

  def Message processData(Message message) { 
    def body = message.getBody(String);
    body = body.replaceAll("\n", "\r\n");
    
    def multipartBody = """------cpi\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="DOC_T_V6.pdf"\r\nContent-Type: application/pdf\r\nContent-Transfer-Encoding: Binary\r\n\r\n""" + body + """\r\n\r\n------cpi--""";
    message.setBody(multipartBody);
    return message;
}

 

 

Sample Input :

Unable to attach the Base64 encoded string as the values exceeds. Shared PDF can be converted to Base64 String and can be used as input.

entry.title: BIB Integration issue from SAP to Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently transferring Global Info data from SAP to Success Factors, via the SF Personal Info section. The entity ID used for this process in SAP is: "ERP_WS_18_GBR - Global Info UK Template for Web Service."

We are running the standard SAP program "ECPAO_EMPL_DMT_JOB_SCHEDULER" for this purpose. However, we have observed errors in SLG1 below  scenario during the transfer process.

Scenario:Edit/change Infotype 0002(Personal Info)  align with SF Personal Info date and no change in master data. (IT9600) Global info diversity.

Result: The data will flow successfully to SuccessFactors (SF). However  diversity information in SuccessFactors will be deleted.

Any suggestion for above issue

entry.title: Re: How to Plan and Provision an SAP BW Bridge System Landscape
entry.content:
Hi @biswa14 

It's not possible to delete the BW bridge space. You can only delete the complete BW bridge instance. To do so, go to System > Configuration > SAP BW Bridge, mark the BW bridge tenant, and click 'Delete'.

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Re: Integration architecture guide: Updated version available now
entry.content: Awesome, and I shared your post in LinkedIn. Great to read!

entry.title: Re: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content: then, did you read what I wrote regarding the path?

entry.title: Business Rule : How can I round the amount into integer number
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I have a business case in order to round the amount of Salary to integer number by using Business Rule in SuccessFactors to apply for this logic

for example case,

1. If employee has salary in ones position from 0.1 - 2.4 (Rank 1) they would like to round down to zero with no digit

For Example 1

   1.1 If Employee has Salary 101,632.40 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,630.00 THB

   1.2 If Employee has Salary 101,632.35 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,630.00 THB

 

2. If employee has salary in ones position from 2.5 - 7.4 (Rank 2) they would like to round to 5 with no digit

For Example2

   2.1 If Employee has Salary 101,632.72 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,635.00 THB

   2.2 If Employee has Salary 101,635.50 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,635.00 THB

   2.3 Employee has Salary 101,637.20 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,635.00 THB

 

3. If employee has salary in ones position from 7.5 (Rank 3) they would like to round to tens position with no digit

For Example 3

   3.1. If Employee has Salary 101,637.50 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,640.00 THB

  3.2 If Employee has Salary 101,638.50 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,640.00 THB

 

Thank you in advance

 

SAP SuccessFactors Platform

entry.title: HCM Brasil: Lembrete - pré-requisitos de Support Package para implementação de SAP Notes – 2025/2026
entry.content:
Olá pessoal,

Espero que estejam bem! Passando aqui para reforçar um lembrete extremamente importante sobre a atualização dos Support Packages em seus sistemas SAP, específico para o produto HCM Brasil.

Como abordado anteriormente no nosso blog, a partir de Maio de 2025, será necessário que todos os sistemas SAP HCM Brasil estejam atualizados com Support Packages lançados em 11 de Maio de 2023. Apenas reforçando: os componentes que serão afetados são SAP_HRCBR e S4HCMCBR.

Por que isso é importante? Atualizar seus Support Packages garante que você tenha acesso às mais recentes funcionalidades, correções de erros, melhorias de segurança e desempenho. Também é essencial para a implementação eficaz de SAP Notes, que são cruciais para atender demandas sistêmicas e legais em tempo hábil.

IMPORTANTE:

A partir de Maio de 2025, qualquer sistema que ainda esteja operacional com um Support Package anterior ao de 2023, não conseguirá implementar SAP Notes referentes aos componentes SAP_HRCBR e S4HCMCBR.

A nossa tabela detalhada com as informações dos Support Packages e as datas relevantes pode ser visualizada novamente abaixo para sua referência:

As informações detalhadas estão disponíveis para consulta no nosso WorkZone.

Recomendamos que você verifique a versão do Support Package que está atualmente em uso e planeje a atualização, caso necessário, o quanto antes. Esse planejamento e ação antecipada são essenciais para evitar qualquer interrupção nos serviços e no aproveitamento das funcionalidades do sistema SAP.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.

Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este Blog post no espaço abaixo. E não esqueçam de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para ficarem ligados nas últimas notícias.

Atenciosamente,

Anderson Marques

entry.title: iFlow - HTTP operation failed invoking https - 401 Auth Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to fetch Token from Ariba API using Basic Auth Credentials.

Getting below error.

 

Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: HTTP operation failed invoking https://api.ariba.com/v2/oauth/token with statusCode: 401. The MPL ID for the failed message is: xxxxx
 
 
Steps we performed:
Content Modifier>Message Header:
Create - Authorization - Constant - Value: Basic 12345677
 
Http Connection:
https://api.ariba.com/v2/oauth/token
Query: grant_type=client_credentials
 
It is working fine through Postman.
Could you please help.
 
Thank you.

entry.title: How to purge I-9 documents in SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 for all the terminated employees
entry.content:
Hi All

Client is using SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0. Can you let me know if it is possible to delete the I-9 documents for all the terminated employees at once. If yes could you please share me the steps to achieve this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Best Practices for Just Ask
entry.content: Very nicely written. Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Barcelona 2024 Recap
entry.content:
We would like to start our recap with a sincere gratituted to all who contributed making it happen, our attendees, speakers, sponsors and volunteers. This year 2024 with 80+ attendees that made SITBarcelona gathering incredible.

On Thursday evening, staff, friends and speakers of SITBarcelona enjoyed an alltogether informal dinner in a relaxed and friendly atmosphere before the event.

     

This eighth edition of SAP Inside Track Barcelona featured a diverse and engaging program. It included presentations by SAP experts and members of the SAP Community Network, touching on a variety of cutting-edge topics.

Antonio AncosSAP 2024 de la A a la Z
Antonio LeiteKnowledge Graphs with SAP Data
Josetxu FernandezGenAI in SAP Data and Analytics
Fran Villegas

Get Business insights from your SAP data with Natural Language and Develop Gen AI solutions integrating AWS and SAP BTP Services

Alejandro RodriguezSAP BTP Chef: first SAP demo where all the pillars of BTP are shown in a practical business case.
Felipe BorgesGlobal eCompliance with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
Gregory DoukasTechnician Training Tool powered by Apple Vision Pro and SAP S/4HANA
Maria Codinach and Harsh KumarFrit Ravich's success case in the modernization of sales application: from SMP to in-house middleware
Niranjan GattupalliImplementing gCTS for Continous Delivery in complex S/4HANA landscapes: Branching Models, Hotfix strategies and 5-Tier Architecture
Antonio ValladaresIntegration Suite addon build in SAP CAP by Code10
Bernhard LueckeReinventing Support with AI

Between the sessions at the breaks, were made several raffle to win 2 e-books and 1month free subscription to all attendees thanks to Espresso Tutorials, 2 e-books thanks to SAP PRESS and 5 100€ Gift Cards from SAP Store thanks to CUVIV. Here we would like to thank so much our beloved SAP Champions and friend Nil Peksen who accepted to be on stage and run some of the draws.

In addition to the insightful presentations, the event also featured a hands-on session led by Antonio Maradiaga, a member of the SAP Developer Advocates. This practical session focused on SAP Build Code and demonstrated how to develop applications using Generative AI and SAP's Joule Assistant.

As every past event, remember that all content was recorded and now availabe here. And also all official photos will be published in this album for you.

We would like to specially thank you to SAP people from Spain like  Luis Felipe Lanz, Bernhard Luecke, Jorge Perez, Cesar Martin, Antonio Maradiaga, Rafael Valdes and Carles Viaplana for their continous engament with our local SAP Community and supporting the event to take it to the next level.

As said before, big thanks to all our sponsors who year after year believe and support our SAP Community event:

The event concluded with a great sense of excitement, leaving everyone eagerly anticipating next year’s edition. A heartfelt thanks to all attendees, speakers, sponsors, and volunteers who made it all possible.

SAP Inside Track Barcelona continues to prove itself as one of the most influential events in the SAP community, offering a platform for knowledge sharing, networking, and exploring the latest innovations in the SAP ecosystem.

So, looking forward to meet all of you in SAP Inside Track Barcelona 2025!!

Mireia Bubi, Lluis Salvador, Enric Castella, Losel Tenzin, Imma Salmeron, David Ruiz

entry.title: LISTCUBE Remote Cube - Error reading the data of InfoProvider
entry.content:
Dear all

When I run LISTCUBE for a remote cube I got this messages:

Exception /SCWM/CX_MD_INTERFACE occurred

Error reading the data of InfoProvider <remote cube name>

Message No. DBMAN305

The long text error message says:

Please you help to solve it.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi @ChandraV @Matt_Fraser @graziela @CarlosAccorsi 

We are in SAP HR 604 and recently upgraded support stacks from J8 to L0. During this upgrade we kept the TUB level at 147 Cyclic K2.

Before we apply support stacks, we ran a full payroll for all payroll area and saved the file (pay period 24 for bi-weekly and pay period 47 for weekly). Then we apply support stacks to L0, ran full payroll again for the same pay period  (pay period 24 for bi-weekly and pay period 47for weekly). Now we compare both the run and find out some discrepancies for Mississippi employees state with holding with a difference of $1.00. This   Scenario is explained below in detail.

EE: XXXXXX in HQ1 (Quality system). This employee is a weekly employee who belongs to payroll area “XX”. When we run payroll ir regular payroll for Pay period 47 2024.

This employee has regular time wage types and one supplemental wage type 3013. The supplemental wage type 3013 has an amount of 30.59. During pre the calculated tax for 30.59 is $2.00 and after implementing support stack, calculated taxes for the supplemental amount for $30.59 is $1.00.

Does anyone has this issues? or if you find any note resolving this... please do let me know.

entry.title: Re: How to get User details in BTP RAP
entry.content: Thanks IngoBraeuninger. This worked.

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Hi @junwu

Yes, it works, but the # is wrong. But that's not my question. I already have a context and want to access the bound function from it.
I come from the list report to the object page, where I have my own fragment in which I define my table. Here it should derive the context independently without js coding from me.

entry.title: Re: #CAP-TechBytes Input Validation
entry.content:
Hello guys,

is it possible in CAP to create custom validation rules in combination with custom annotation based validations to check user input, e.g. if a field should be validated that the given value has a certain length and consists only of upper case values, a custom message like e.g. "Input should contain upper case letters only with length of 3 characters" ? 

As far as I have understood, the CAP standard provides simple validation rules only or is there a validation API I can use for this purpose?

Thanks,

Stephan

entry.title: License type for purchasing user
entry.content:
Hello,

My client is asking what type of license purchasing users consume with the new FUE format, Advanced Use or Core Use.
